title: Uruguayan Crunchy Pecorino Fritters
description: A crispy, savory snack inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, made with crunchy vegetables and pecorino cheese.

ingredients.name: 1 cup crunchy vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers

instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine crunchy vegetables, flour, pecorino cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
2. Add the melted butter and mix well.
3. Beat the egg in a separate bowl and add it to the vegetable mixture.
4. Mix everything together until a dough forms.
5. Heat about 1-2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
6. When the oil is hot, use a spoon to drop small balls of the dough into the oil.
7. Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
8. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
10. Optional: Serve with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
